findings.location: s2 (List と Map をコンポーネントとして登録する)
findings.description: The Java retrieval example for the `list` element is omitted. The source demonstrates index-based access (list.get(0), list.get(1), list.get(2)) with type casting (ComponentB, String), showing that element order matches XML definition order. The knowledge file includes the map retrieval example but not the list retrieval.
findings.source_evidence: ComponentA compA = (ComponentA) SystemRepository.getObject("compA"); List<?> list = compA.getListProperty(); ComponentB compB_0 = (ComponentB) list.get(0); // "compB_0" が取得できる ... String stringValue = (String) list.get(2); // 文字列 "String value" が取得できる
